html: Most building portfolios still run on a simple rule: something breaks, then people move. For decades, reactive maintenance was considered inevitable. It is not. It is a financial choice.
text: Most building portfolios still run on a simple rule: something breaks, then people move. For decades, reactive maintenance was considered inevitable. It is not. It is a financial choice.

html: Reactive models create volatile operating expense, unpredictable downtime, and a weak risk story for insurers and boards. Time-based preventive programs help, but they still replace some assets too early and others too late. The real performance shift starts when you stop guessing and start using live data.
text: Reactive models create volatile operating expense, unpredictable downtime, and a weak risk story for insurers and boards. Time-based preventive programs help, but they still replace some assets too early and others too late. The real performance shift starts when you stop guessing and start using live data.

html: In commercial real estate, predictive maintenance is no longer an engineering experiment. It is a finance strategy.
text: In commercial real estate, predictive maintenance is no longer an engineering experiment. It is a finance strategy.

html: What are the four maintenance models in real estate?
text: What are the four maintenance models in real estate?

html: Across portfolios, maintenance strategies usually fall into one of four models:
text: Across portfolios, maintenance strategies usually fall into one of four models:

html: Reactive. Wait for failure or tenant complaints.
text: Reactive. Wait for failure or tenant complaints.

html: Highest and least predictable cost.
text: Highest and least predictable cost.

html: Emergency dispatch, premium rates, reputational damage.
text: Emergency dispatch, premium rates, reputational damage.

html: Preventive. Follow calendar or usage schedules.
text: Preventive. Follow calendar or usage schedules.

html: Better than reactive, but still wasteful.
text: Better than reactive, but still wasteful.

html: Good assets are replaced early, bad assets slip through.
text: Good assets are replaced early, bad assets slip through.

html: Condition-based. Act when measured asset condition crosses thresholds.
text: Condition-based. Act when measured asset condition crosses thresholds.

html: More efficient.
text: More efficient.

html: Interventions are triggered by evidence, not dates.
text: Interventions are triggered by evidence, not dates.

html: Predictive. Use continuous data and analytics to forecast failure risk and expected impact.
text: Predictive. Use continuous data and analytics to forecast failure risk and expected impact.

html: Lowest total cost over time.
text: Lowest total cost over time.

html: Interventions are timed to minimize Total Cost of Risk Ownership (TCRO) and disruption.
text: Interventions are timed to minimize Total Cost of Risk Ownership (TCRO) and disruption.

html: The model you choose determines how much unplanned risk, emergency spend, and avoidable outage you carry inside TCRO.
text: The model you choose determines how much unplanned risk, emergency spend, and avoidable outage you carry inside TCRO [link to /blog/total-cost-of-risk-ownership].

html: Why should CFOs care which model they run?
text: Why should CFOs care which model they run?

html: Maintenance models are often framed as technical choices. For a CFO or asset owner, they are TCRO choices.
text: Maintenance models are often framed as technical choices. For a CFO or asset owner, they are TCRO choices.

html: Reactive environments drive:
text: Reactive environments drive:

html: Emergency repair premiums
text: Emergency repair premiums

html: Higher incident frequency and severity
text: Higher incident frequency and severity

html: Business interruption that never turns into a claim
text: Business interruption that never turns into a claim

html: Capital decisions made under duress instead of on a plan
text: Capital decisions made under duress instead of on a plan

html: Predictive environments reduce:
text: Predictive environments reduce:

html: Unplanned failures that destroy budgets
text: Unplanned failures that destroy budgets

html: Overtime and rush-order parts
text: Overtime and rush-order parts

html: Insurance friction at renewal
text: Insurance friction at renewal

html: The gap between planned and actual capital timing
text: The gap between planned and actual capital timing

html: In other words, your maintenance model is a lever on operating margin, insurance outcomes, and asset value – not just a question for facilities.
text: In other words, your maintenance model is a lever on operating margin, insurance outcomes, and asset value – not just a question for facilities.

html: For a deeper look at how this ties back into capital planning, see How TCRO Changes Capital Planning: From Age-Based Replacement to Risk-Weighted Investment.
text: For a deeper look at how this ties back into capital planning, see How TCRO Changes Capital Planning: From Age-Based Replacement to Risk-Weighted Investment [link to /blog/tcro-capital-planning].

html: How does condition-based maintenance bridge the gap?
text: How does condition-based maintenance bridge the gap?

html: You do not leap from reactive to predictive in one step. The practical bridge is condition-based maintenance.
text: You do not leap from reactive to predictive in one step. The practical bridge is condition-based maintenance.

html: Instead of relying purely on fixed schedules, you:
text: Instead of relying purely on fixed schedules, you:

html: Instrument critical systems with sensors for vibration, temperature, pressure, and flow.
text: Instrument critical systems with sensors for vibration, temperature, pressure, and flow.

html: Define thresholds that reflect true risk, not nuisance alarms.
text: Define thresholds that reflect true risk, not nuisance alarms.

html: Trigger work orders when data crosses those thresholds.
text: Trigger work orders when data crosses those thresholds.

html: Capture the intervention and the outcome in one shared system.
text: Capture the intervention and the outcome in one shared system.

html: This approach:
text: This approach:

html: Cuts obvious waste in preventive programs.
text: Cuts obvious waste in preventive programs.

html: Produces the fault and intervention history you need to build reliable predictive models.
text: Produces the fault and intervention history you need to build reliable predictive models.

html: Builds trust in the data with operations and finance.
text: Builds trust in the data with operations and finance.

html: Condition-based maintenance is where governance, operations, and finance start to align. The same data that feeds maintenance decisions will later feed your TCRO metrics and TCRO dashboard.
text: Condition-based maintenance is where governance, operations, and finance start to align. The same data that feeds maintenance decisions will later feed your TCRO metrics and TCRO dashboard [link to /blog/tcro-dashboard-board-needs].

html: What do predictive operations look like in the field?
text: What do predictive operations look like in the field?

html: Consider a 50-year-old events and entertainment campus that needed to modernize infrastructure without ripping it out.
text: Consider a 50-year-old events and entertainment campus that needed to modernize infrastructure without ripping it out.

html: The team focused on three areas:
text: The team focused on three areas:

html: Ice-making plant. Vibration monitoring on pumps and motors to detect early failure.
text: Ice-making plant. Vibration monitoring on pumps and motors to detect early failure.

html: Water systems. Leak and flow detection on high-risk lines.
text: Water systems. Leak and flow detection on high-risk lines.

html: Gas and environment. Seismic shut-off and gas monitoring, noise and weather data for public safety.
text: Gas and environment. Seismic shut-off and gas monitoring, noise and weather data for public safety.

html: The financial and risk outcomes were clear:
text: The financial and risk outcomes were clear:

html: A single vibration alert on a key motor prevented a maximum probable loss of up to $5M in property damage, business interruption, and insurance impact.
text: A single vibration alert on a key motor prevented a maximum probable loss of up to $5M in property damage, business interruption, and insurance impact.

html: A previously invisible natural gas leak worth more than $400K per year was discovered and stopped.
text: A previously invisible natural gas leak worth more than $400K per year was discovered and stopped.

html: Lighting modernization tied into the same program cut electrical use by roughly 30% with a 4.5-year payback.
text: Lighting modernization tied into the same program cut electrical use by roughly 30% with a 4.5-year payback.

html: Annual insurance premium growth held at 0% in a hard market.
text: Annual insurance premium growth held at 0% in a hard market.

html: At a specialized dementia care facility, continuous commissioning and monitoring identified uncommissioned drives, misconfigured rooftop units, and under-performing heat exchangers. Fixing those issues produced six-figure handover savings and ongoing operating savings – while reducing outbreak risk and staffing strain.
text: At a specialized dementia care facility, continuous commissioning and monitoring identified uncommissioned drives, misconfigured rooftop units, and under-performing heat exchangers. Fixing those issues produced six-figure handover savings and ongoing operating savings – while reducing outbreak risk and staffing strain.

html: These are not just engineering wins. They are TCRO shifts.
text: These are not just engineering wins. They are TCRO shifts.

html: You can see the underlying stories in more depth in the case studies.
text: You can see the underlying stories in more depth in the case studies [link to /resources/case-studies].

html: How do you move from reactive to predictive operations?
text: How do you move from reactive to predictive operations?

html: Moving to predictive operations is a sequence, not a switch.
text: Moving to predictive operations is a sequence, not a switch.

html: A practical path:
text: A practical path:

html: Baseline and triage.
text: Baseline and triage.

html: Build an inventory of critical assets.
text: Build an inventory of critical assets.

html: Quantify emergency spend, downtime, and tenant impact over the last 12–24 months.
text: Quantify emergency spend, downtime, and tenant impact over the last 12–24 months.

html: Prioritize systems by financial and human risk.
text: Prioritize systems by financial and human risk.

html: Standardize preventive work.
text: Standardize preventive work.

html: Clean up the basics.
text: Clean up the basics.

html: Remove obvious waste in schedules and inconsistent practices.
text: Remove obvious waste in schedules and inconsistent practices.

html: Deploy condition monitoring.
text: Deploy condition monitoring.

html: Install monitoring on the highest-impact systems first.
text: Install monitoring on the highest-impact systems first.

html: Start with a small number of sites and assets where failures hurt most.
text: Start with a small number of sites and assets where failures hurt most.

html: Integrate workflows.
text: Integrate workflows.

html: Connect telemetry, work orders, and reporting into one data environment.
text: Connect telemetry, work orders, and reporting into one data environment.

html: No more parallel spreadsheets or disconnected ticketing tools.
text: No more parallel spreadsheets or disconnected ticketing tools.

html: Build predictive models.
text: Build predictive models.

html: Use fault history and live data to forecast failure risk and expected impact.
text: Use fault history and live data to forecast failure risk and expected impact.

html: Validate and refine models against real outcomes.
text: Validate and refine models against real outcomes.

html: Scale across the portfolio.
text: Scale across the portfolio.

html: Extend to more buildings and asset classes.
text: Extend to more buildings and asset classes.

html: Tie insights back into capital planning, insurance strategy, and TCRO metrics.
text: Tie insights back into capital planning, insurance strategy, and TCRO metrics [link to /blog/total-cost-of-risk-ownership].

html: This is not a technology project in isolation. It is an operating-model change that finance, operations, and risk should co-own.
text: This is not a technology project in isolation. It is an operating-model change that finance, operations, and risk should co-own.

html: For how governance underpins this, see Data Governance Is Not an IT Project. It Is the Operating System of Financial Control.
text: For how governance underpins this, see Data Governance Is Not an IT Project. It Is the Operating System of Financial Control [link to /blog/data-governance-real-estate].

html: Where to go from here
text: Where to go from here

html: If you want to understand what your current maintenance model is really costing you, there are two practical ways to begin:
text: If you want to understand what your current maintenance model is really costing you, there are two practical ways to begin:

html: Model the impact on TCRO. Use the TCRO calculator to plug in your current mix of failures, emergency work, and planned maintenance. Adjust the assumptions to reflect a more predictive model and see what that does to Total Cost of Risk Ownership.
text: Model the impact on TCRO. Use the TCRO calculator to plug in your current mix of failures, emergency work, and planned maintenance. Adjust the assumptions to reflect a more predictive model and see what that does to Total Cost of Risk Ownership [link to /tcro#calculator].

html: Get a one-day, asset-level savings estimate. If you have a flagship building where reactive work is out of control, use Estimate Your Savings. Share one representative property and, within one business day, you will receive a reviewed estimate of what predictive operations could change for that asset’s risk and insurance profile.
text: Get a one-day, asset-level savings estimate. If you have a flagship building where reactive work is out of control, use Estimate Your Savings. Share one representative property and, within one business day, you will receive a reviewed estimate of what predictive operations could change for that asset’s risk and insurance profile [link to /tcro/estimate-your-savings].

html: Once you see the numbers in your own context, the choice of maintenance model stops being a technical debate and becomes what it really is: a financial decision about how much avoidable risk you are prepared to carry.
text: Once you see the numbers in your own context, the choice of maintenance model stops being a technical debate and becomes what it really is: a financial decision about how much avoidable risk you are prepared to carry.
